name: Rapido Credit Repair
description_short: Texas-based credit repair company that disputes negative items on credit reports and claims to improve scores by an average of 60 points in 6 months through personalized dispute letters and case management.
description_long:
Rapido Credit Repair is a credit repair specialist based in Mission, Texas, operating in the fix-my-credit space. The company markets itself as experienced in consumer, business, and mortgage credit with a focus on helping clients throughout Texas, including major cities like Houston, Dallas, Austin, and San Antonio. Founded on the principle that credit education and correction is legal, the company positions itself as offering ethical and legal credit repair services.

The company's core service involves disputing negative items on credit reports through personalized dispute options, custom dispute letters submitted on behalf of clients, and dedicated case analysts who work directly with clients. They offer free credit consultations, in-depth credit analysis, and credit recommendations upfront. Clients receive 24/7 access to case status information and claim to receive updated credit reports every 15-45 days. The company also provides credit counseling services alongside repair work.

Rapido Credit Repair distinguishes itself through a 100% money-back guarantee (with specific conditions), claims of no long-term binding contracts, and stated average credit score improvements of 60 points in 6 months. They cite specific improvement metrics: 93% of clients see 10+ point increases within 35 days, and 25% see 100+ point increases within 90 days. The company emphasizes personalized service with an assigned case analyst and affordable, reasonable fees.

However, the guarantee comes with extensive conditions including minimum negatives (4+), payment compliance, no prior credit repair attempts within 2 years, and a 25% minimum removal threshold. The claimed score improvements lack third-party verification and represent averages that may not reflect typical outcomes. The company's track record data is self-reported and not independently audited. Additionally, the broad geographic service claims across multiple Texas cities raise questions about localized service quality.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers 100% money-back guarantee with clearly stated conditions and requirements
No long-term binding contracts; clients can cancel with 7 days' written notice
Provides 24/7 access to case status and updated information online
Includes free credit consultation, analysis, and recommendations before enrollment
Claims reasonable fees and states willingness to work on accounts until resolution
Assigns dedicated case analyst and case advisor for personal service throughout process
Provides custom dispute letters and handles all credit bureau documentation preparation
cons: 100% guarantee has 8 specific eligibility conditions that may disqualify many applicants (e.g., no credit repair attempts in prior 2 years, minimum 4 negatives required)
Claimed average score improvements (60 points in 6 months, 100+ points in some cases) lack independent verification and are self-reported
Company states it works on negatives to 'try and get maximum removals' but does not guarantee specific removal outcomes
Broad geographic service claims across multiple Texas cities with single contact location (Mission) raise questions about localized support quality
Money-back guarantee explicitly voids if services are canceled, creating potential conflict with right to cancel anytime
best_for: Texas residents with 4+ negative items on their credit reports who have not used credit repair services in the past 2 years
Consumers planning to apply for mortgages or auto loans and seeking credit score improvement before application
Individuals who want hands-on case management and dispute letter preparation rather than DIY credit repair
diagnosis: Rapido Credit Repair is best suited for Texas residents with multiple negative accounts who haven't previously attempted credit repair and want personalized dispute management with a money-back guarantee. The primary caveat is that the guarantee contains restrictive eligibility conditions, claimed improvements lack third-party verification, and actual removal outcomes depend on the legitimacy of disputes rather than company performance.
services: Credit dispute filing on behalf of clients with major credit bureaus
Custom dispute letter preparation and submission
Free initial credit consultation and analysis
Free credit recommendations based on individual reports
Dedicated case analyst and case advisor assignment
24/7 online case status access and updates
Credit monitoring and tracking with updated reports every 15-45 days
Service across multiple Texas locations (McAllen, Edinburg, Brownsville, San Antonio, Houston, Austin, Dallas, Laredo)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 705 E Griffin Pkwy Suite C, Mission, TX 78572
